zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Fleming於1170年出生在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特時，她的父親Anselm Le Fleming15歲，母親Agnes of Dunbar8歲。她與Sir Ralph Deincourt在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1228年在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Fleming was born in 1170, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, her father, Anselm Le Fleming, was 15 and her mother, Agnes of Dunbar, was 8. She married Sir Ralph Deincourt in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1228, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Fleming est née en 1170, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Anselm Le Fleming, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Agnes of Dunbar, avait 8 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Deincourt à Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1228, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Flemingが1170年にイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターで生まれた時，父Anselm Le Flemingは15歳，母Agnes of Dunbarは8歳であった。イギリスイギリスウエストモーランドシズエルグ ハルでSir Ralph Deincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1228年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Fleming(이)가 1170년 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anselm Le Fleming(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes of Dunbar(은)는 8세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 시즈르그h 홀에서 Sir Ralph Deincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1228년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.
